TEXT.source: Atayal Wikipedia, article: lubuw_na_Tayal_泰雅族的口簧琴
TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: 泰雅族傳統文化 lubuw na Tayal lubuw ta qani ga, mhyuci, mthhwuy ru kinbalay na hngyang kinbhgan Tayal. ksobeh pqzyu qsliq soya, tluhing, bahing, pqas na qqaya ka knalay ruma. piyux balay squliq misuw mnglung lubuw ga, cisal pssi inlungan mrkyas na tlbugan. ana ga, qaya qani smatu psmyuk squliq na sngya'an. lubuw ga qsliq balay na tlbugan tayal ru mluw balay qnxan ta tayal uzi. maki' balay kinmhgan squ tlbugan tayal qu lubuw. pqzyu qsliq, smbes myugi ru gmluw plubuw pngsa. tbuci plubuw nanak ginaw nya. pcqun lubuw ga gmluw mlubuw p'pira hmali tlubuw. saxa na hmali ini ptnaq wagiq hngyang nya ru ini ptnaq plbugan saxa tayal uzi. yasa tlbugan mrhuw raral tayal squ mhngaw, psqasan, mlata ru pcisan. lubuw ga skalay kya 10cm qrozyux na ruma. plkun bling qrozyux ska ru s'an hmali rum aini ga baliq. sazing syaw tunux sblingan squzi qasing. mlubuw ga qutux qbaq meng ngungu na lubuw. binah qbaq hmuluy gasing pgtuw hmali bung bung hmngyang.ru sgluw p'yugun ngqaw 'myuw hngya' an nya. tayal sraral s'agal ta ruma kbalay lubuw, hmali. kahul ziray Gipun lga, yasa maki' l'ung p'yugun hmali ru hopa cikay hngyang nya.
S.PHON: ******* luβuw na tajal luβuw ta qani ɣa, mħjuʦ~ʨi, mtħħwuj ru kinβalaj na ħŋjaŋ kinβħɣan tajal. ks~ɕoβeħ pqzju qs~ɕliq s~ɕoja, tluħiŋ, βaħiŋ, pqas~ɕ na qqaja ka knalaj ruma. pijux βalaj s~ɕquliq mis~ɕuw mŋluŋ luβuw ɣa, ʦ~ʨis~ɕal ps~ɕs~ɕi inluŋan mrkjas~ɕ na tlβuɣan. ana ɣa, qaja qani s~ɕmatu ps~ɕmjuk s~ɕquliq na s~ɕŋjaʔan. luβuw ɣa qs~ɕliq βalaj na tlβuɣan tajal ru mluw βalaj qnxan ta tajal uzi. makiʔ βalaj kinmħɣan s~ɕqu tlβuɣan tajal qu luβuw. pqzju qs~ɕliq, s~ɕmβes~ɕ mjuɣi ru ɣmluw pluβuw pŋs~ɕa. tβuʦ~ʨi pluβuw nanak ɣinaw nja. pʦ~ʨqun luβuw ɣa ɣmluw mluβuw pʔpira ħmali tluβuw. s~ɕaxa na ħmali ini ptnaq waɣiq ħŋjaŋ nja ru ini ptnaq plβuɣan s~ɕaxa tajal uzi. jas~ɕa tlβuɣan mrħuw raral tajal s~ɕqu mħŋaw, ps~ɕqas~ɕan, mlata ru pʦ~ʨis~ɕan. luβuw ɣa s~ɕkalaj kja **ʦ~ʨm qrozjux na ruma. plkun βliŋ qrozjux s~ɕka ru s~ɕʔan ħmali rum aini ɣa βaliq. s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕjaw tunux s~ɕβliŋan s~ɕquzi qas~ɕiŋ. mluβuw ɣa qutux qβaq meŋ ŋuŋu na luβuw. βinaħ qβaq ħmuluj ɣas~ɕiŋ pɣtuw ħmali βuŋ βuŋ ħmŋjaŋ.ru s~ɕɣluw pʔjuɣun ŋqaw ʔmjuw ħŋjaʔ an nja. tajal s~ɕraral s~ɕʔaɣal ta ruma kβalaj luβuw, ħmali. kaħul ziraj ɣipun lɣa, jas~ɕa makiʔ lʔuŋ pʔjuɣun ħmali ru ħopa ʦ~ʨikaj ħŋjaŋ nja.
S.FORM: 泰雅族傳統文化 lubuw na Tayal lubuw ta qani ga, mhyuci, mthhwuy ru kinbalay na hngyang kinbhgan Tayal. ksobeh pqzyu qsliq soya, tluhing, bahing, pqas na qqaya ka knalay ruma. piyux balay squliq misuw mnglung lubuw ga, cisal pssi inlungan mrkyas na tlbugan. ana ga, qaya qani smatu psmyuk squliq na sngya'an. lubuw ga qsliq balay na tlbugan tayal ru mluw balay qnxan ta tayal uzi. maki' balay kinmhgan squ tlbugan tayal qu lubuw. pqzyu qsliq, smbes myugi ru gmluw plubuw pngsa. tbuci plubuw nanak ginaw nya. pcqun lubuw ga gmluw mlubuw p'pira hmali tlubuw. saxa na hmali ini ptnaq wagiq hngyang nya ru ini ptnaq plbugan saxa tayal uzi. yasa tlbugan mrhuw raral tayal squ mhngaw, psqasan, mlata ru pcisan. lubuw ga skalay kya 10cm qrozyux na ruma. plkun bling qrozyux ska ru s'an hmali rum aini ga baliq. sazing syaw tunux sblingan squzi qasing. mlubuw ga qutux qbaq meng ngungu na lubuw. binah qbaq hmuluy gasing pgtuw hmali bung bung hmngyang.ru sgluw p'yugun ngqaw 'myuw hngya' an nya. tayal sraral s'agal ta ruma kbalay lubuw, hmali. kahul ziray Gipun lga, yasa maki' l'ung p'yugun hmali ru hopa cikay hngyang nya.
S.PHON: ******* luβuw na tajal luβuw ta qani ɣa, mħjuʦ~ʨi, mtħħwuj ru kinβalaj na ħŋjaŋ kinβħɣan tajal. ks~ɕoβeħ pqzju qs~ɕliq s~ɕoja, tluħiŋ, βaħiŋ, pqas~ɕ na qqaja ka knalaj ruma. pijux βalaj s~ɕquliq mis~ɕuw mŋluŋ luβuw ɣa, ʦ~ʨis~ɕal ps~ɕs~ɕi inluŋan mrkjas~ɕ na tlβuɣan. ana ɣa, qaja qani s~ɕmatu ps~ɕmjuk s~ɕquliq na s~ɕŋjaʔan. luβuw ɣa qs~ɕliq βalaj na tlβuɣan tajal ru mluw βalaj qnxan ta tajal uzi. makiʔ βalaj kinmħɣan s~ɕqu tlβuɣan tajal qu luβuw. pqzju qs~ɕliq, s~ɕmβes~ɕ mjuɣi ru ɣmluw pluβuw pŋs~ɕa. tβuʦ~ʨi pluβuw nanak ɣinaw nja. pʦ~ʨqun luβuw ɣa ɣmluw mluβuw pʔpira ħmali tluβuw. s~ɕaxa na ħmali ini ptnaq waɣiq ħŋjaŋ nja ru ini ptnaq plβuɣan s~ɕaxa tajal uzi. jas~ɕa tlβuɣan mrħuw raral tajal s~ɕqu mħŋaw, ps~ɕqas~ɕan, mlata ru pʦ~ʨis~ɕan. luβuw ɣa s~ɕkalaj kja **ʦ~ʨm qrozjux na ruma. plkun βliŋ qrozjux s~ɕka ru s~ɕʔan ħmali rum aini ɣa βaliq. s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕjaw tunux s~ɕβliŋan s~ɕquzi qas~ɕiŋ. mluβuw ɣa qutux qβaq meŋ ŋuŋu na luβuw. βinaħ qβaq ħmuluj ɣas~ɕiŋ pɣtuw ħmali βuŋ βuŋ ħmŋjaŋ.ru s~ɕɣluw pʔjuɣun ŋqaw ʔmjuw ħŋjaʔ an nja. tajal s~ɕraral s~ɕʔaɣal ta ruma kβalaj luβuw, ħmali. kaħul ziraj ɣipun lɣa, jas~ɕa makiʔ lʔuŋ pʔjuɣun ħmali ru ħopa ʦ~ʨikaj ħŋjaŋ nja.
